eng-global-json-2026-06-21.description: Add global.json to pin .NET SDK to 10.0.x (Closes #62) - tracking issue #73 has click-to-create link

improve-cache-json-options-2026-06-21.description: Cache JsonSerializerOptions as static readonly fields - tracking issue #72

fix-all-monitors-color-temp.description: Fix: apply current colour temperature when enabling all-monitors mode

fix-hotkey-feedback.description: Fix: notify user when global hotkey registration fails - tracking issue #65

test-appsettings-2026-06-22.description: Add AppSettings unit test project (xUnit, 12 tests) - tracking issue #75

perf-mouse-hook-2026-06-22.description: Perf: reduce GC pressure from WH_MOUSE_LL hook - tracking issue #76

eng-ci-pr-check-2026-06-23.description: Add CI build check on push/PR to master (.github/workflows/ci.yml)

maintainer_preferences: Prefers bug fixes and functional improvements. Closed refactoring PRs (LerpColor, ApplyDisplayAffinity) as not_planned. Closed atomic-settings-save PR as not_planned. Does not want pure refactors without user-visible benefit.
notes: 2026-06-23 run: Task4 - added CI build check workflow (.github/workflows/ci.yml) - runs on push/PR to master. Task2 - no new human issues; #24 already commented, no new activity. Note: all recent Repo Assist 'PRs' were actually tracking issues with click-to-create links due to protected files restriction. Monthly summary updated (#74).
